task: Find the weight of baggage allowance for economy class on Qatar Airways.
final_result_response:
Based on the Qatar Airways baggage allowance page, here is the complete information about the **Economy Class baggage allowance weights**:

---

**Carry-on baggage (all Economy fares):** 1 piece up to **7 kg (15 lb)**

**Checked baggage – Flights to/from Africa or the Americas (piece concept):**
- **Economy Lite:** 1 piece up to **23 kg (50 lb)**
- **Economy Classic, Convenience & Comfort:** 2 pieces up to **23 kg (50 lb)** each

**Checked baggage – All other destinations (weight concept):**
- **Economy Lite:** **20 kg (44 lb)**
- **Economy Classic:** **25 kg (55 lb)**
- **Economy Convenience:** **30 kg (66 lb)**
- **Economy Comfort:** **35 kg (77 lb)**

> *Note: For flights to/from Brazil, Economy class customers can carry one piece of carry-on baggage up to 10 kg (22 lb).*

The most common Economy Class checked baggage allowance is **30 kg (66 lb)** for the Economy Convenience fare on weight-concept routes, while the standard **23 kg (50 lb) per piece** applies for piece-concept routes (Africa/Americas).
